name: YourInformation
author: BeeAZ-pm-pl
readme_markdown:
YourInformation | v1.0.1


✔️ Basic management of player information ✔️ [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/965662639168569394.svg?label=&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&color=7389D8&labelColor=6A7EC2)](https://discord.gg/KrjD6t9HJt)


## Features - Manage player information - Adjust data sending style
## Commands | **Commands** | **Description** | | --- | --- | | **/myinfo** | **Display the term information in the server** |
## Permissions | **Permission** | **Default** | | --- | --- | | **yourinformation.command.use** | **true** |
## Config ``` --- ui: true #if false the information will send with the message form, if true the information will send with the ui form. ... ```
## Install - Step 1: Click the "Direct Download" button to download the plugin - Step 2: move the file "YourInformation.phar" into the file "plugins" - Step 3: Restart server for plugins to work
